calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Joseph Lee, Esq. 415-398-5000, Law Offices of Brian Larsen for Plaintiff.
Aaron Nesbitt, Esq. 720-798-1620 QPWB for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received from Defense.

ARGUED. Mr. Nesbitt disagress with the TR and presents arguments on "no evidence standard" and "lack of evidence produced"; cites case law, supreme court procedure, requests to take the matter under submission and reviews case law cited. Mr. Leeagrees with the TR; verified responses, Defense misunderstands the law, will seek sanctions after today's hearing. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT FERNANDO ROXAS, AMBROSIA HOLDINGS INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Defendants Fernando J. Roxas and Ambrosia Holdings' motion for summary judgment is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
